goal: Forensic audit of v10 microstructure overlay: verify reproducibility, detect leakage, confirm same-window improvement, and deliver a final CONFIRMED / DOWNGRADED / REJECTED verdict.
global_constraints: Immutable reference is active-signal-v1@1 — never modify or re-tune the base.
No new features, no new directional scouts, no early-cut, no label changes allowed.
All comparisons must use identical train / selection-OOS / lockbox windows.
Short-only, long-only, and combined veto must be tested in separate independent runs — never aggregated.
Rule-based (threshold / bucket) overlay must be validated before any model-backed overlay.
PROMOTE verdict only after every forensic block passes; any confirmed leakage triggers REJECTED.
No mixing of reproduction checks, leakage checks, and new ideas in the same run.

slices.title: Snapshot assembly audit
slices.hypothesis: Verify that veto overlay was applied in correct causal order without retroactive trade blocking or mixed long/short logic.
slices.objective: Verify that veto overlay was applied in correct causal order without retroactive trade blocking or mixed long/short logic.
success_criteria: Per-variant causal verdict recorded: decision_timing_ok, causal_blocking_ok, side_isolation_ok.
evidence_requirements: Per-variant causal verdict recorded: decision_timing_ok, causal_blocking_ok, side_isolation_ok.

slices.title: Same-window matched reruns
slices.hypothesis: Run base and all overlay variants on the identical lockbox window for unambiguous comparison.
slices.objective: Run base and all overlay variants on the identical lockbox window for unambiguous comparison.
success_criteria: Complete matched same-window comparison table with all four routes.
evidence_requirements: Complete matched same-window comparison table with all four routes.

slices.title: Cannibalization and ownership audit
slices.hypothesis: Prove overlay improvement comes from removing genuinely bad trades, not from hidden interactions or coverage loss.
slices.objective: Prove overlay improvement comes from removing genuinely bad trades, not from hidden interactions or coverage loss.
success_criteria: Honest ownership/cannibalization verdict per route with quantified evidence.
evidence_requirements: Honest ownership/cannibalization verdict per route with quantified evidence.
